rule: Groups are not moved. Groups are prepared, cleared, and then moved.

blockers.description: row uses wildcard source pattern and is not executable as a concrete move
blockers.resolution: Expand wildcard rows into concrete file rows and re-run move-group-analyze before any move apply.

blockers.description: adapter coupling requires grouped migration of related integration points
blockers.resolution: Build a coordinated runtime migration set (execution chain + adapters), simulate full rewrite impact, then move as one governed group.

blockers.description: row uses wildcard source pattern and is not executable as a concrete move
blockers.resolution: Expand wildcard rows into concrete file rows and re-run move-group-analyze before any move apply.

blockers.description: runtime-critical file requires coordinated chain-safe migration
blockers.resolution: Build a coordinated runtime migration set (execution chain + adapters), simulate full rewrite impact, then move as one governed group.

blockers.description: row uses wildcard source pattern and is not executable as a concrete move
blockers.resolution: Expand wildcard rows into concrete file rows and re-run move-group-analyze before any move apply.

blockers.description: runtime-critical file requires coordinated chain-safe migration
blockers.resolution: Build a coordinated runtime migration set (execution chain + adapters), simulate full rewrite impact, then move as one governed group.

blockers.description: outbound import path resolves outside target ownership repo
blockers.resolution: Resolve ownership boundary by relocating coupled producer and consumer modules together, then rewrite imports to target-owned paths.

blockers.description: inbound imports originate from a different repo than target ownership
blockers.resolution: Resolve ownership boundary by relocating coupled producer and consumer modules together, then rewrite imports to target-owned paths.

blockers.description: dependency depth is high and needs staged normalization
blockers.resolution: Build a coordinated runtime migration set (execution chain + adapters), simulate full rewrite impact, then move as one governed group.

blockers.description: adapter coupling requires grouped migration of related integration points
blockers.resolution: Build a coordinated runtime migration set (execution chain + adapters), simulate full rewrite impact, then move as one governed group.
